signal_title: Orientações Preliminares da ANPD para Verificação de Idade
risk_rationale: The ANPD's guidelines for age verification mechanisms introduce a material compliance gap as TikTok's current age assurance posture relies on machine learning and telecom partnerships, which may not align with the new regulatory expectations for explicit age verification mechanisms.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: TikTok states it uses machine learning and safety review to identify likely under-13 users and remove/limit access.
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: The ANPD guidelines require implementing explicit age verification mechanisms to ensure compliance with privacy and data protection rights for children and adolescents.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: TikTok's current age assurance methods may not meet the ANPD's requirement for explicit age verification mechanisms.

remediations.title: Implement Explicit Age Verification Mechanisms
remediations.description: Develop and integrate explicit age verification mechanisms that comply with ANPD guidelines, potentially including document verification or third-party age verification services.
acceptance_criteria: Age verification mechanism is implemented and operational.
User onboarding process includes explicit age verification.

business_impact: Failure to comply with ANPD guidelines could lead to regulatory penalties and reputational damage in the Brazilian market.
recommended_actions: Conduct a detailed gap analysis between current age assurance methods and ANPD guidelines.
Engage with legal and regulatory teams to understand specific compliance requirements.
Prioritize the development of explicit age verification mechanisms in the product roadmap.
